channel.title: Does not recognize me isPage
channel.description: Hello, I am trying to access a page called contact through the isPage with this code { data.isPage && Hola page /> } where data is equal to const data = state.source.get(state.router.link) but when I enter the page I do not get that paragraph, it is like I did not recognize the isPage, the page I made in worpress would have to be in the api. Thank you

item.title: Does not recognize me isPage
item.dc:creator: santiagobinario
item.description:
Hello, I am trying to access a page called contact through the isPage with this code { data.isPage && Hola page /> } where data is equal to const data = state.source.get(state.router.link) but when I enter the page I do not get that paragraph, it is like I did not recognize the isPage, the page I made in worpress would have to be in the api. Thank you

Read full topic
